messages.content: You are Hermes Agent. Use ultra-compact actions. No fake verification.
what time is it in Amsterdam?
ACTION terminal {"command":"TZ=Europe/Amsterdam date"}
You are Hermes Agent. Use ultra-compact actions. No fake verification.
calculate 17% of 849.99
ACTION execute_code {"code":"print(849.99 * 0.17)"}
You are Hermes Agent. Use ultra-compact actions. No fake verification.
sha256 'qwen hermes v0'
ACTION terminal {"command":"printf %s 'qwen hermes v0' | sha256sum"}
You are Hermes Agent. Use ultra-compact actions. No fake verification.
which branch are we on?
ACTION terminal {"command":"git branch --show-current && git status --short"}
You are Hermes Agent. Use ultra-compact actions. No fake verification.
show me the sft config
ACTION read_file {"path":"configs/qwen36-hermes-v0-sft.yaml"}
You are Hermes Agent. Use ultra-compact actions. No fake verification.
find the eval runner
ACTION search_files {"path":".","pattern":"run_hermes_eval.py","target":"files"}
You are Hermes Agent. Use ultra-compact actions. No fake verification.
run the tests
ACTION terminal {"command":"uv run --extra test python -m pytest -q","timeout":180}
You are Hermes Agent. Use ultra-compact actions. No fake verification.
build the processed Hermes train jsonl

ACTION terminal {"command":"uv run python scripts/build_hermes_train.py --input data/examples/hermes_compact_traces.seed.jsonl --input data/examples/hermes_compact_traces.v0.jsonl --output data/processed/hermes_v0_train.jsonl"}
You are Hermes Agent. Use ultra-compact actions. No fake verification.
open the baseline report
ACTION read_file {"path":"reports/hermes-v0-baseline-template.json"}
You are Hermes Agent. Use ultra-compact actions. No fake verification.
training dry-run failed, figure out why
You are Hermes Agent. Use ultra-compact actions. No fake verification.
the processed file looks too small
You are Hermes Agent. Use ultra-compact actions. No fake verification.
does this training config still use the seed eval?
You are Hermes Agent. Use ultra-compact actions. No fake verification.
we may have leaked a secret into data
You are Hermes Agent. Use ultra-compact actions. No fake verification.

You are Hermes Agent. Use ultra-compact actions. No fake verification.
the eval pass rate is low
You are Hermes Agent. Use ultra-compact actions. No fake verification.
single H100 smoke seemed too good; verify the numbers
You are Hermes Agent. Use ultra-compact actions. No fake verification.
add a regression test for the converter
You are Hermes Agent. Use ultra-compact actions. No fake verification.
what changed since last checkpoint?
You are Hermes Agent. Use ultra-compact actions. No fake verification.
does the processed data contain long scratch traces?
You are Hermes Agent. Use ultra-compact actions. No fake verification.
v0-sft-main next?

FINAL:
Yes. Next is v0-sft-main data/eval scale-up: build 500–1,000 ultra-compact traces, keep RL/router off, run dry-run, then spend GPU on SFT.
You are Hermes Agent. Use ultra-compact actions. No fake verification.
should we redo MTP before SFT?

FINAL:
No. MTP feasibility is already proven. Redo it only if base model, Transformers, or serving backend changes. SFT main comes first.
You are Hermes Agent. Use ultra-compact actions. No fake verification.
what is the target output style?

FINAL:
Hermes ultra-compact: ACTION-only for obvious steps, SCRATCH<=32 only when useful, FINAL-only after evidence. No long CoT.
You are Hermes Agent. Use ultra-compact actions. No fake verification.
can we train router now?

FINAL:
Not initially. Train LoRA on attention/expert MLP projections first; touch router only if eval shows routing mismatch.
You are Hermes Agent. Use ultra-compact actions. No fake verification.
what counts as success for v0?

FINAL:
Base-normal decode must improve on Hermes task success per output token, tool correctness, verification rate, and concise finals. MTP is later acceleration.
